calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Proceedings Not Reported.

Ruth H. Downes, Esq. appeared for plaintiff.
Stephen Booth, Esq. appeared for defendant Alanna Greenham, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 10, 2014.
Declaration of Plaintiff in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial, (CCP Section 98) and supporting papers & documentation, was served on defendant Alanna Greenham on May 7, 2014, and filed on May 9, 2014.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of defendant Alanna Greenham and against plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC as follows:

Defendant Alanna Greenham shall have judgment against the complaint of plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC and that Portfolio Revocery Associates, LLC shall taken nothing by way of its complaint against defendant Alanna Greenham.

Judgment for defendant Alanna Greenham was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
